text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The academy grounds certainly are<n>vast... Much
like the Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I used to get lost in those halls all the<n>time as a
child. The butler often had to<n>come find me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother, in her infinite wisdom,<n>decided to
place a number of plushies<n>around the halls to
help me identify<n>where I—
